title: techmap-ing module with underspecified input port connections creates new undriven signal

features.name: underspecified module instantiation with internal submodule wiring
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where fewer ports are connected than declared, and the module internally wires all its ports to a submodule

features.name: techmap transformation with blackbox module
features.description: Code should include a techmap pass that replaces a module with a blackbox version, where the original module had complete port connections internally but the instantiation had underspecified connections
features.snippet:
design -stash techmap
read_verilog <<EOT
(* blackbox *)
module sub(input i, output o, input j);
endmodule
EOT
techmap -map %techmap

features.name: undriven signal after transformation
features.description: Code should include a wire that is used in port connections but has no driver after techmap transformation
